falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above its 200-day moving average by 3.5% or more within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate a strong bullish trend contradicting the 'bottom' pattern and invalidating the HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume on the NASDAQ exceeds 200% of its 30-day average volume for three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Sustained extreme volume would suggest a blowoff top scenario, directly contradicting the bottom pattern and HOLD signal

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX drops below 12.0 (its 10-day moving average) while the S&P 500 makes a new 200-day high
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This combination would indicate extreme complacency and trend continuation, invalidating the 'bottom' pattern and HOLD signal

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
